title: BuffoonSkies 2
description: Skyblock Modpack for the Buffooncraft SMP
body:
Welcome to the official Buffooncraft SMP Skyblock modpack!
This pack transforms the empty void into a living world above the clouds. Explore vibrant floating islands, interact with custom NPCs, and enjoy a “vanilla-plus” experience enhanced with carefully selected mods that keep the charm of Minecraft while expanding its possibilities.
Perfect for adventurers, builders, and Buffoons alike!
